tasks.title: Add outflow intent E2E tests
tasks.description: Add E2E test flow for outflow intents after inflow tests are finalized
tasks.details: Extend E2E test suite to include outflow intent flow. After inflow tests complete, add outflow test where Alice creates an outflow intent on Chain 1 (hub) to send tokens to the connected chain. Test flow: 1) Alice creates outflow request intent on hub chain (tokens locked on hub), 2) Solver transfers tokens on connected chain to Alice's connected chain address, 3) Solver submits transaction hash to verifier for validation, 4) Verifier validates and generates approval signature, 5) Solver uses signature to fulfill hub intent and receive locked tokens as reward. Update E2E test scripts to include this flow after inflow tests.
tasks.testStrategy: Create E2E test script that runs outflow flow after inflow, verify tokens are locked on hub, verify solver transfer on connected chain, verify verifier validation and signature generation, verify hub intent fulfillment with signature, verify token balances match expected outcomes

subtasks.title: Create outflow hub intent creation test script
subtasks.description: Create bash script to set up and test Alice creating outflow intent on hub chain (Chain 1), where tokens are locked on the hub
subtasks.details:
Implement submit-outflow-hub-intent.sh script in testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/ that: 1) Generates random intent_id, 2) Gets APT metadata addresses for both chains, 3) Generates solver signature for outflow intent (offered tokens on hub, desired tokens on connected chain), 4) Registers solver in registry if needed, 5) Calls create_outflow_request_intent_entry on hub chain to lock tokens and create intent with requester_address_connected_chain parameter, 6) Verifies intent creation via LimitOrderEvent or OracleLimitOrderEvent, 7) Saves intent info for subsequent scripts. Use existing inflow scripts as reference pattern.
<info added on 2025-11-18T14:00:56.617Z>

Script successfully implemented at testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/submit-outflow-hub-intent.sh (237 lines). Verified implementation includes: Random intent_id generation via openssl (line 14), verifier public key loaded from verifier_testing.toml config with base64-to-hex conversion (lines 40-72), APT metadata extraction for both chains using extract_apt_metadata utility (lines 100-108), solver signature generation with correct outflow parameters (offered_amount on chain 1/hub, desired_amount on chain 2/connected) via generate_solver_signature utility (lines 133-146), solver registration in registry using register_solver utility (line 167), create_outflow_request_intent_entry call with all 12 required parameters including requester_address_connected_chain and verifier_public_key (lines 178-180), intent verification via LimitOrderEvent/OracleLimitOrderEvent in transaction events (lines 188-196), and intent info persistence using save_intent_info utility function (line 221). Script follows same structure as submit-hub-intent.sh inflow script and integrates with existing utility functions from util.sh and util_mvm.sh.

subtasks.testStrategy: Run script standalone, verify intent created on hub chain via transaction events, verify tokens locked in hub intent object, verify intent includes requester_address_connected_chain field

subtasks.title: Create outflow solver transfer test script
subtasks.description: Create bash script to test solver (Bob) transferring tokens directly to Alice's connected chain address without escrow
subtasks.details:
Implement submit-outflow-solver-transfer.sh script in testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/ that: 1) Loads intent_id from previous step, 2) Gets Alice's Chain 2 address from intent (requester_address_connected_chain), 3) Calls utils::transfer_fa_with_metadata function on Chain 2 as Bob to transfer tokens directly to Alice with intent_id embedded as metadata, 4) Verifies transfer completed by checking Alice's balance increased, 5) Saves transaction hash for verifier validation. This is a direct transfer, NOT an escrow - Alice receives tokens immediately.
<info added on 2025-11-18T14:04:34.002Z>
Script fully implemented with 159 lines. Direct transfer mechanism confirmed (NO escrow). Alice receives tokens immediately on Chain 2. Transfer executes via utils::transfer_with_intent_id function at lines 73-75. Transaction hash extracted from Chain 2 REST API (lines 85-86). Balance verification logic implemented (lines 92-118) confirming Alice +transfer_amount, Bob -transfer_amount-gas. Output saved to .test-data/outflow-transfer-info.txt (lines 121-124) containing transaction_hash and intent_id for next step's verifier validation. Script location: testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/submit-outflow-solver-transfer.sh
</info added on 2025-11-18T14:04:34.002Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Run script after hub intent creation, verify Bob's balance decreased on Chain 2, verify Alice's balance increased on Chain 2 by desired_amount, verify transaction includes intent_id metadata, capture transaction hash for verifier

subtasks.title: Create outflow verifier validation test script
subtasks.description: Create bash script to test verifier validating solver's connected chain transfer and generating approval signature for hub fulfillment
subtasks.details:
Implement validate-outflow-transfer.sh script in testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/ that: 1) Loads transaction_hash and intent_id from previous step, 2) Calls verifier's validate-outflow-fulfillment endpoint with transaction hash and connected chain info, 3) Verifies response contains valid=true, 4) Extracts approval signature from response, 5) Saves signature for hub intent fulfillment. The verifier should query the connected chain transaction, extract intent_id and transfer parameters, validate they match the hub intent requirements, and return approval signature.
<info added on 2025-11-18T14:06:55.157Z>

IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE: Script fully implemented (138 lines) with all required functionality. Validates data flow from previous step via .test-data/outflow-transfer-info.txt (lines 18-37), includes verifier service health check (lines 45-52), constructs proper JSON payload with transaction_hash, chain_type='mvm', and intent_id (lines 55-62), successfully calls POST /validate-outflow-fulfillment endpoint (lines 68-71), validates response structure with success=true check (lines 78-85), verifies validation.valid=true field (lines 88-101), extracts approval_signature (lines 104-115), and persists approval signature, signature_type, intent_id, and transaction_hash to .test-data/outflow-approval-info.txt for hub fulfillment step (lines 118-123). subtasks.testStrategy: Run script after solver transfer, verify verifier endpoint returns success response, verify approval signature is present and valid format (hex string), verify verifier logs show transaction was queried and validated

subtasks.title: Create outflow hub fulfillment test script
subtasks.description: Create bash script to test solver (Bob) fulfilling the hub intent using verifier signature to claim locked tokens as reward
subtasks.details:
Implement fulfill-outflow-hub-intent.sh script in testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/ that: 1) Loads hub_intent_address and verifier_signature from previous steps, 2) Calls fulfill_outflow_request_intent on hub chain as Bob with verifier signature, 3) Verifies hub intent is fulfilled and tokens are released to Bob, 4) Checks Bob's balance increased on hub chain by offered_amount. This uses the oracle-guarded intent mechanism where verifier signature authorizes the release of locked tokens to the reserved solver.
<info added on 2025-11-18T14:10:18.720Z>
Based on the user request, here is the new text that should be appended to the subtask's details:

Script successfully implemented as outflow-fulfill-hub-intent.sh (148 lines). Loads intent_id and hub_intent_address from intent info file, loads approval_signature from .test-data/outflow-approval-info.txt (saved by validation step), retrieves Bob's initial balance on Chain 1, converts signature to hex format, calls fulfill_outflow_request_intent as Bob with intent object address and verifier signature bytes, verifies Bob's balance increased by approximately offered_amount (100000000 minus gas fees) confirming locked tokens were released as reward, and displays comprehensive summary of the complete outflow flow. All outflow scripts renamed with 'outflow-' prefix (outflow-submit-hub-intent.sh, outflow-solver-transfer.sh, outflow-validate-transfer.sh, outflow-fulfill-hub-intent.sh) and inflow scripts renamed with 'inflow-' prefix for consistency. run-tests.sh updated to reference new inflow file names.
</info added on 2025-11-18T14:10:18.720Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Run script after verifier validation, verify Bob's balance increased on Chain 1 by offered_amount, verify hub intent object shows fulfilled status, verify transaction succeeded with verifier signature validation

subtasks.title: Integrate outflow tests into run-tests.sh
subtasks.description: Update the main E2E test runner to execute outflow test flow after inflow tests complete, and verify end-to-end token balance changes
subtasks.details:
Modify testing-infra/e2e-tests-mvm/run-tests.sh to: 1) Add execution of outflow test scripts in sequence after inflow tests complete (submit-outflow-hub-intent.sh, submit-outflow-solver-transfer.sh, validate-outflow-transfer.sh, fulfill-outflow-hub-intent.sh), 2) Add balance verification showing Alice received tokens on connected chain and Bob received tokens on hub chain, 3) Add cleanup of outflow test artifacts, 4) Update test output to distinguish between inflow and outflow test phases. Ensure tests run sequentially with proper dependency ordering.
